zh.lifeSummary: 當Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair於大約1120年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾時，他的父親King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore44歲，母親Sibylla Fitzhenry26歲。他於1142年與Mariotte MacGillebride在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1168年在英國蘇格蘭莫雷享年49歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair于大约1120年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾时，他的父亲King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore44岁，母亲Sibylla Fitzhenry26岁。他于1142年与Mariotte MacGillebride在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1168年在英国苏格兰莫雷享年49岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Máel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Fanciful spelling of Gail , also occasionally written Gaelle .

variants.name: Gail
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

nameMeanings.name: Coluim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Colm
meanings: Traditional Irish form of the Late Latin personal name Columba ‘dove’. See Callum .

en.lifeSummary: When Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair was born about 1120, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore, was 44 and his mother, Sibylla Fitzhenry, was 26. He married Mariotte MacGillebride in 1142, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1168, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair est né environ 1120, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Sibylla Fitzhenry, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mariotte MacGillebride en 1142, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1168, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair um 1120 in Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore 44 und seine Mutter Sibylla Fitzhenry 26. Er hat 1142 in Schottland, United Kingdom Mariotte MacGillebride geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair è nato il circa 1120 nel Stirlingshire, Scotland, il suo padre, King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Sibylla Fitzhenry, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mariotte MacGillebride nel 1142, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1168, nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandairが約1120年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで生まれた時，父King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmoreは44歳，母Sibylla Fitzhenryは26歳であった。1142年にイギリススコットランドでMariotte MacGillebrideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1168年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで49歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오천브레c크

ko.lifeSummary: Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair(이)가 대략 1120년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylla Fitzhenry(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1142년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mariotte MacGillebride(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1168년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Sibylla Fitzhenry, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariotte MacGillebride em 1142, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1168, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: кинтир, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair родился около 1120 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Sibylla Fitzhenry, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariotte MacGillebride в 1142 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1168 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair nació aproximadamente 1120, en Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Sibylla Fitzhenry, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mariotte MacGillebride en 1142, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1168, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
